programme.desc: A malevolent government agent threatens to destroy the friendship between a boy and a huge alien robot. Starring Jennifer Aniston, Eli Marienthal, Harry Connick Jr..

programme.title: Maid in Manhattan
programme.desc: A senatorial candidate (Ralph Fiennes) falls for a chambermaid (Jennifer Lopez) after he mistakes her for a guest (Natasha Richardson) at the hotel. Starring Jennifer Lopez, Ralph Fiennes, Natasha Richardson.

programme.title: Still Mine
programme.desc: A farmer fights back when local authorities hamper his efforts to build a cottage for his dementia-stricken wife. Starring James Cromwell, Geneviève Bujold, Campbell Scott.

programme.title: Kayak to Klemtu
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl readies for a kayak trip along the shores of the Great Bear rainforest with her family to protest oil tanker traffic. Starring Evan Adams, Jared Ager-Foster, Carmel Amit.

programme.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
programme.desc: Family tensions arise after a woman (Nia Vardalos) falls in love with a man (John Corbett) who is not Greek. Starring Nia Vardalos, John Corbett, Michael Constantine.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: An actual witch (Nicole Kidman) and a neurotic movie star (Will Ferrell) land the lead roles in a television remake of the 1960s sitcom. Starring Nicole Kidman, Will Ferrell, Shirley MacLaine.

programme.title: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby: Unrated
programme.desc: NASCAR driver Ricky Bobby faces his greatest challenge ever when French Formula One driver Jean Girard roars onto the scene. Starring Will Ferrell, John C. Reilly, Sacha Baron Cohen.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Kanan returns to Queens where Raq tries to mend the many fractures in the Thomas family; as Raq expands her empire, Kanan doubts his future in the drug game; Detective Howard gets released from the hospital.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Raq learns she may have a snitch and tasks Marvin with confirming the rumor; Lou brings in a potential new artist, but he and Crown disagree; Kanan helps Famous sell mix tapes; Jukebox tracks down her estranged mother.

programme.title: Blood Quantum
programme.desc: The dead are coming back to life and almost all of Earth's population is decimated due to a zombie virus, except for the isolated Mi'kmaq reserve of Red Crow, whose indigenous inhabitants are strangely immune to the zombie plague. Starring Michael Greyeyes, Elle-Maija Tailfeathers, Forrest Goodluck.

programme.title: Dangerous
programme.desc: An ex-con and reformed sociopath battles a band of heavily armed mercenaries as he tries to uncover the truth behind his brother's mysterious death. Starring Scott Eastwood, Mel Gibson, Tyrese Gibson.

programme.title: Good Neighbours
programme.desc: Victor is new to Montreal and attempts to make friends with the wheelchair-bound Spencer and the cat-loving Louise, but everybody is on edge with a serial killer terrorizing the neighborhood. Starring Jay Baruchel, Scott Speedman, Emily Hampshire.

programme.title: They Were Expendable
programme.desc: Heroic PT boat captains (Robert Montgomery, John Wayne) fight Japanese ships in the World War II Philippines. Starring Robert Montgomery, John Wayne, Donna Reed.

programme.title: To Sir, With Love
programme.desc: Unable to find employment in his field, a black engineer accepts a teaching position in a tough East End London school. Starring Sidney Poitier, Judy Geeson, Christian Roberts.

programme.title: A Piece of the Action
programme.desc: Two con men (Sidney Poitier, Bill Cosby) are persuaded by a retired policeman (James Earl Jones) to volunteer their services to a ghetto youth center. Starring Sidney Poitier, Bill Cosby, James Earl Jones.

programme.title: Strangers on a Train
programme.desc: A psychopath (Robert Walker) and a tennis player (Farley Granger) meet in a club car and plot that each will murder someone for the other. Starring Robert Walker, Farley Granger, Ruth Roman.

programme.title: Dial M for Murder
programme.desc: A husband's plot to murder his unfaithful wife goes awry in Alfred Hitchcock's adaptation of the Frederick Knott play. Starring Ray Milland, Grace Kelly, Bob Cummings.

programme.title: Wait Until Dark
programme.desc: Intruders search a blind woman's (Audrey Hepburn) Greenwich Village apartment for a heroin-filled doll. Starring Audrey Hepburn, Alan Arkin, Richard Crenna.

programme.title: Forbidden Planet
programme.desc: An astronaut (Leslie Nielsen) and crew land on Altair-4 in 2200 and find a mad doctor (Walter Pidgeon), his daughter (Anne Francis) and Robby the robot. Starring Walter Pidgeon, Anne Francis, Leslie Nielsen.

programme.title: Kiss Me Kate
programme.desc: Lilli and Fred act the same way offstage as they do in The Taming of the Shrew. Starring Kathryn Grayson, Howard Keel, Ann Miller.

programme.title: Strangers on a Train
programme.desc: A psychopath (Robert Walker) and a tennis player (Farley Granger) meet in a club car and plot that each will murder someone for the other. Starring Robert Walker, Farley Granger, Ruth Roman.

programme.title: Humoresque
programme.desc: A married socialite (Joan Crawford) falls tragically in love with a classical violinist (John Garfield). Starring Joan Crawford, John Garfield, Oscar Levant.

programme.title: The Nun's Story
programme.desc: The daughter of a Belgian surgeon enters a convent in hopes of serving God as a nursing nun in the Congo. Starring Audrey Hepburn, Peter Finch, Edith Evans.

programme.title: South Pacific
programme.desc: Navy nurse Nellie (Mitzi Gaynor) falls for plantation-owner Emile (Rossano Brazzi), who accepts a top-secret World War II mission. Starring Mitzi Gaynor, Rossano Brazzi, John Kerr.

programme.title: Silkwood
programme.desc: Karen Silkwood (Meryl Streep) blows the whistle on hazards and a cover-up at the Oklahoma nuclear plant where she works. Starring Meryl Streep, Kurt Russell, Cher.

programme.title: Moonstruck
programme.desc: An Italian-American widow (Cher), engaged to a reticent suitor, falls in love with his brother (Nicolas Cage). Starring Cher, Nicolas Cage, Vincent Gardenia.

programme.title: The Rag Man
programme.desc: Tim Kelly (Jackie Coogan), an orphan living in New York City, jumps into an old junk dealer's wagon to avoid the police. Despite the junk dealer's initial reluctance, they quickly forge a partnership that leads them through success and failure. Starring Jackie Coogan, Max Davidson, Lydia Yeamans Titus.

programme.title: Fires on the Plain
programme.desc: A gravely ill Japanese soldier tries to hang on to his humanity while his abandoned comrades resort to cannibalism. Starring Eiji Funakoshi, Mantaro Ushio, Yoshiro Hamaguchi.

programme.title: Pigs and Battleships
programme.desc: A Japanese junkman's son sees the Yakuza as his ticket out of the slums. Starring Hiroyuki Nagato, Jitsuko Yoshimura, Tetsurô Tanba.

programme.title: Devotion
programme.desc: Emily Brontë (Ida Lupino) and her sister Charlotte (Olivia de Havilland) form a triangle with a curate (Paul Henreid) in the 1830s Yorkshire. Starring Ida Lupino, Paul Henreid, Olivia de Havilland.

programme.title: The Bachelor and the Bobby-Soxer
programme.desc: A judge (Myrna Loy) orders a playboy (Cary Grant) to date her infatuated teenage sister (Shirley Temple) to cure the girl's crush on him. Starring Cary Grant, Myrna Loy, Shirley Temple.

programme.title: Two Girls and a Sailor
programme.desc: A sailor (Van Johnson) from a rich family meets a nightclub-singing sister act (June Allyson, Gloria DeHaven) in wartime New York. Starring Van Johnson, June Allyson, Gloria DeHaven.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Four sisters in Massachusetts forge unbreakable family ties in this adaptation of Louisa May Alcott's story. Starring Katharine Hepburn, Joan Bennett, Frances Dee.

programme.title: Double Wedding
programme.desc: A dress designer (Myrna Loy) falls for a lazy artist (William Powell) after deeming him unworthy of her sister (Florence Rice). Starring William Powell, Myrna Loy, Florence Rice.

programme.title: Meet Me in St. Louis
programme.desc: A St. Louis lawyer's (Leon Ames) family (Judy Garland, Margaret O'Brien) stays in town for the 1904 World's Fair. Starring Judy Garland, Margaret O'Brien, Leon Ames.

programme.title: The Makioka Sisters
programme.desc: Two unmarried Japanese sisters from a fallen Osaka family hurt one older sister (Keiko Kishi) by living with another (Yoshiko Sakuma). Starring Keiko Kishi, Yoshiko Sakuma, Sayuri Yoshinaga.

programme.title: Dead Men Don't Wear Plaid
programme.desc: A gumshoe (Steve Martin) hunts a Nazi (Carl Reiner) for a svelte client (Rachel Ward) and meets rough characters clipped from 1940s films. Starring Steve Martin, Rachel Ward, Carl Reiner.

programme.title: The Jerk
programme.desc: A simpleton (Steve Martin) leaves his foster family, acquires a girlfriend (Bernadette Peters) and invents slip-proof eyeglasses. Starring Steve Martin, Bernadette Peters, Catlin Adams.

programme.title: Pennies From Heaven
programme.desc: A sheet-music salesman (Steve Martin) escapes his wife, girlfriend (Bernadette Peters) and the Depression through his songs. Starring Steve Martin, Bernadette Peters, Christopher Walken.

programme.title: Broadway Melody of 1940
programme.desc: A casting mix-up leads a dancer (George Murphy) to land a major role intended for his partner (Fred Astaire). Starring Fred Astaire, Eleanor Powell, George Murphy.

programme.title: Gold Diggers of 1935
programme.desc: Romance strikes when a vacationing millionairess and her daughter spend their vacation at a posh New England resort. Starring Dick Powell, Gloria Stuart, Adolphe Menjou.

programme.title: Come to Dinner
programme.desc: A wealthy matriarch hosts a dinner party for a duke and duchess in a parody of "Dinner at Eight." Starring Ninon Bunyea, Flavia Arcaro, Herschel Mayall.

programme.title: The Belle of New York
programme.desc: Charlie's playboy ways dismay his wealthy aunt, who demands he change his ways, but he is unconvinced until he meets charity worker Angela and falls hopelessly in love. Starring Fred Astaire, Vera-Ellen, Marjorie Main.

programme.title: Ten Thousand Bedrooms
programme.desc: An American hotel tycoon (Dean Martin) goes to Rome and courts a girl (Anna Maria Alberghetti) who cannot marry until her three sisters do. Starring Dean Martin, Anna Maria Alberghetti, Eva Bartok.

programme.title: Skirts Ahoy!
programme.desc: Unlucky in love, three women (Esther Williams, Joan Evans, Vivian Blaine) join the WAVES to see the world and meet men. Starring Esther Williams, Joan Evans, Vivian Blaine.

programme.title: Duchess of Idaho
programme.desc: A water-ballet star (Esther Williams) falls for a band leader (Van Johnson) while in Sun Valley to help her friend woo a playboy (John Lund). Starring Esther Williams, Van Johnson, John Lund.

programme.title: For the First Time
programme.desc: An opera singer (Mario Lanza) with a bad attitude falls in love with a deaf girl (Johanna von Koczian) who changes his life. Starring Mario Lanza, Zsa Zsa Gabor, Johanna von Koczian.

programme.title: Strictly Dishonorable
programme.desc: An Italian opera star (Ezio Pinza) has a marriage of convenience with an innocent fan (Janet Leigh) from Mississippi. Starring Ezio Pinza, Janet Leigh, Millard Mitchell.

programme.title: Small Town Girl
programme.desc: A judge's daughter (Jane Powell) keeps an eye on a playboy (Farley Granger) who gets 30 days in jail for speeding. Starring Jane Powell, Farley Granger, Ann Miller.

programme.title: Bring Your Smile Along
programme.desc: A New England teacher (Constance Towers) goes to New York and helps a pop composer (Keefe Brasselle) write a singer's (Frankie Laine) hits. Starring Frankie Laine, Constance Towers, Keefe Brasselle.

programme.title: Record of a Tenement Gentleman
programme.desc: A widow (Choko Iida) in postwar Japan begrudgingly adopts an abandoned boy (Hohi Aoki) whom she grows to love. Starring Choko Iida, Hohi Aoki, Shohichi Kawamura.

programme.title: A Hen in the Wind
programme.desc: A soldier returns home at the end of World War II, and refuses to forgive his wife for prostituting herself one night to pay off medical bills for their son during the heights of the war. Starring Kinuyo Tanaka, Shûji Sano, Chieko Murata.

programme.title: Flavor of Green Tea Over Rice
programme.desc: In the 1950s, married life had become dull for Japanese couple Mokichi and Taeko. Their niece is determined to escape their fate and refuses to accept an arranged marriage. With tentative steps, this family slowly moves into the modern age. Starring Shin Saburi, Michiyo Kogure, Kôji Tsuruta.

programme.title: Early Spring
programme.desc: A young married man and his wife deal with a passionless relationship while he has an extramarital affair. Starring Haruko Sugimura, Chishu Ryu, Teiji Takahashi.

programme.title: Tokyo Twilight
programme.desc: Two sisters move home in trouble where they learn their mother is not dead. Starring Ineko Arima, Kamatari Fujiwara, Setsuko Hara.

programme.title: Atomic Reaction
programme.desc: An exploration of Canada's role in the creation of the nuclear bomb and the effects of the aftermath on the community of Port Hope. Taking a look at the exploitation of the Dene people in the 1930s, who transported raw uranium.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A woman goes missing in Dec., 2016; her abandoned car is found on a bridge.

programme.title: Influenced to Kill
programme.desc: Popular lifestyle influencer Amanda Jane mysteriously vanishes after staying at a struggling inn. Suspicious of foul play, an employee looks into Amanda's disappearance, not realizing that she's at risk of becoming the next victim. Starring Kyla Nova, Allen Williamson, Ashley Brinkman.

programme.title: Trapped in the Spotlight
programme.desc: A psychotic music producer kidnaps a cancelled R&B singer and her former co-star 15 years after they broke up. With their lives and legacies on the line, the estranged duo must face the demons from their past to make it out alive. Starring Monique Coleman, Melyssa Ford, Emmanuel Kabongo.

programme.title: Tall, Dark and Dangerous
programme.desc: As Valentine's Day approaches, a successful real estate attorney finds her seemingly perfect match on a dating app. However, she soon realizes that the man is an impostor who stole the identity of his former roommate to insert himself into her life. Starring Jamie Bernadette, Matthew Pohlkamp, Michael Paré.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: After a series of security lapses, Wells Fargo had over $7 Million stolen in one night in a heist dubbed White Eagle; bizarrely, it was pulled of by a revolutionary guerrilla group from Puerto Rico.

programme.title: Charmed to Death
programme.desc: Shawnie meets Ron online and the romance develops over a shared love of athletics; Shawnie moves to the mountains to be with Ron, but when his erratic behavior turns from manipulative to criminal, she must confront Ron's secret life.

programme.title: Targeted for Murder
programme.desc: A carjacking murder is far more than it appears when police piece together surveillance videos and track the killer who parked the car and walked away.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Ashley Melnyczok's death at the hands of two ex-soldiers; investigators piece together evidence that paints a picture of betrayal and greed.

programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: Nothing is as it seems when an undocumented Filipina immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home. She and her daughter soon become ensnared by a terrible secret that threatens to tear them apart. Starring Max Eigenmann, Jaeden Boadilla, Leanne Best.

programme.title: Mary J. Blige's Family Affair
programme.desc: Tensions rise between Kendra and Ben as they move out of the city and struggle with fertility issues. Their relationship reaches a boiling point when Ben secretly helps his brother, while Kendra returns to the city and reunites with an old friend. Starring Ajiona Alexus, Da'Vinchi, Princess Davis.

programme.title: God's Creatures
programme.desc: A mother tells a lie for her beloved son that rips apart their family and close-knit Irish town -- ultimately testing her own sense of right and wrong. Starring Emily Watson, Paul Mescal, Aisling Franciosi.

programme.desc: Police questions Stephen after he speaks to news outlets about the search for a woman missing from his building; when Stephen appears to shut down completely, the challenge moves from looking for a confession to trying to get him to speak at all.

programme.title: Outlaw Posse (2024)
programme.desc: In 1908 an outlaw returns from years of hiding in Mexico to claim stolen gold hidden in the hills of Montana.

programme.title: World Trade Center (2006)
programme.desc: Two Port Authority officers become trapped in the rubble of the World Trade Center after going in to help people escape from the buildings during the terrorist attacks of September 11, 2001.

programme.title: Breakdown (1997)
programme.desc: A man's (Kurt Russell) wife (Kathleen Quinlan) disappears in the desert Southwest after accepting a trucker's (J.T. Walsh) help with car trouble.

programme.title: Undisputed (2002)
programme.desc: An undefeated world-champion prizefighter, who is convicted of rape and sent to prison, must confront and fight the reigning prison boxing champion.

programme.title: The Back-up Plan (2010)
programme.desc: A single woman (Jennifer Lopez) meets the man (Alex O'Loughlin) of her dreams on the same day she becomes pregnant through artificial insemination.

programme.title: Kate & Leopold (2001)
programme.desc: A Manhattan woman (Meg Ryan) falls in love with the 19th-century Duke of Albany (Hugh Jackman) who has stepped through a time portal.

programme.title: Jersey Girl (2004)
programme.desc: A young woman (Liv Tyler) changes the life of a single father (Ben Affleck) who used to be a successful New York music publicist.

programme.title: Doin' It (2024)
programme.desc: Moonlighting as a high-school substitute teacher, a 30-year-old virgin gets in over her head when she's assigned to teach sex education.

programme.title: Miles to Go Before I Sleep
programme.desc: The relationships between musicians and their road crews and the importance of the people who work to put shows together.

programme.title: Spotlights: A Showtime Short Film Series
programme.desc: A collection of short films showcasing different themes.

programme.title: The First Wives Club (1996)
programme.desc: Three 50-ish college friends (Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton) plot revenge after their husbands dump them for younger women.

programme.title: Monstrous (2022)
programme.desc: A terrifying new horror awaits Laura and her 7-year-old son, Cody, when they flee her abusive ex-husband and try to settle into a new life. Still traumatized, their fragile existence is pushed to the breaking point.

programme.title: Unhook the Stars (1996)
programme.desc: A suburban widow (Gena Rowlands) fights with a daughter, befriends an abused neighbor's (Marisa Tomei) son and gains a trucker's (Gérard Depardieu) infatuation.

programme.title: Queen Bees (2021)
programme.desc: While her house undergoes repairs, fiercely independent senior Helen temporarily moves into a nearby retirement community, where she encounters lusty widows, cutthroat bridge tournaments and a hotbed of bullying "mean girls."

programme.title: Molly's Game (2017)
programme.desc: Molly Bloom runs the world's most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested by the FBI. Her only ally is defense lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learns that there is much more to Molly than the tabloids lead people to believe.

programme.title: The Aviator (2004)
programme.desc: During the 1930s and '40s, wealthy industrialist Howard Hughes (Leonardo DiCaprio) gains fame as a movie producer, airplane designer and pilot.

programme.title: The Dead Don't Hurt (2023)
programme.desc: When the man she loves, Holger Olsen, goes off to fight in the Civil War, Vivienne Le Coudy must fend for herself in a place controlled by a corrupt mayor and his unscrupulous business partner.

programme.title: Cold Mountain (2003)
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a wounded Confederate soldier (Jude Law) abandons his duties to make his way home to his sweetheart (Nicole Kidman).

programme.title: True Grit (2010)
programme.desc: A teenage girl (Hailee Steinfeld) enlists the aid of a boozy, trigger-happy lawman (Jeff Bridges) to hunt down her father's killer (Josh Brolin).

programme.title: Ida Red (2021)
programme.desc: Crime boss Ida "Red" Walker turns to her son, Wyatt, to pull off one last heist to get out of prison. However, with the FBI closing in, Wyatt must soon choose between family and freedom.

programme.title: The Fan (1981)
programme.desc: Douglas, a record salesman, is an obsessive fan of actress Sally Ross. When his letters are rejected, he strikes out at her and her loved ones.

programme.title: Queen Bees (2021)
programme.desc: While her house undergoes repairs, fiercely independent senior Helen temporarily moves into a nearby retirement community, where she encounters lusty widows, cutthroat bridge tournaments and a hotbed of bullying "mean girls."

programme.title: Spotlights: A Showtime Short Film Series
programme.desc: A collection of short films showcasing different themes.

programme.title: Alone in Berlin (2016)
programme.desc: A German couple lose their son in WWII, prompting them to become secretly anti-Nazi.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment (1983)
programme.desc: A strong-willed woman (Shirley MacLaine) and her equally independent daughter (Debra Winger) keep the lines of communication open as each deals with the curveballs life throws at them.

programme.title: Florence Foster Jenkins (2016)
programme.desc: In the 1940s New York, a man (Hugh Grant) goes to extreme lengths to make sure his wife (Meryl Streep) never finds out that she's an awful opera singer.

programme.title: The English Patient (1996)
programme.desc: A Hungarian count's (Ralph Fiennes) fling with a British newlywed leads to tragedy in World War II North Africa.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandora's box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Waking Up in Reno (2002)
programme.desc: A married man (Billy Bob Thornton) has an affair with his best friend's wife (Charlize Theron) while both couples travel from Arkansas to Nevada.

programme.title: The Friend (2024)
programme.desc: Iris finds her comfortable New York City life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past.

programme.title: I Used to Go Here (2020)
programme.desc: A successful author finds herself deeply enmeshed in the lives of a group of college students after being asked to speak at her alma mater.

programme.title: Jenny's Wedding (2015)
programme.desc: When Jenny (Katherine Heigl) decides to marry a woman (Alexis Bledel), her conventional family must accept who she is or risk losing her forever.

programme.title: Anything for Fame
programme.desc: Venturing into the virtual Wild West to profile a new breed of content creator.

programme.title: Abandon (2002)
programme.desc: A detective (Benjamin Bratt) discovers new facts regarding the disappearance of a collegian's (Katie Holmes) boyfriend (Charlie Hunnam) two years earlier.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part (2017)
programme.desc: Michael and Madison Roland are a married couple; Michael Roland’s controlling behavior leads a pregnant Madison Roland to leave the home; she later discovers that her previous circumstances continue to affect her current life.

programme.title: Love Me (2024)
programme.desc: A buoy and a satellite meet online long after humanity's extinction. As they learn what life was like on Earth, they discover themselves and what it means to be alive and in love.

programme.title: Nothing Compares (2022)
programme.desc: Following the career of singer Sinéad O'Connor through her rise to fame and how her iconoclastic personality led to her exile from the pop mainstream.

programme.title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio (2005)
programme.sub-title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio (2005)
programme.desc: A '50s-era housewife (Julianne Moore) uses her wit and winnings from commercial jingle contests to help support her large family.

programme.title: Stepping Out (1991)
programme.desc: A professional singer/dancer (Liza Minnelli) grooms her diverse amateur-dance class for a charity tap show.

programme.title: A Single Man (2009)
programme.desc: Planning to commit suicide at the end of the day, a gay professor (Colin Firth) who recently lost his lover goes about his daily routine and visits with longtime friends.

programme.title: Atlantic City (1980)
programme.desc: A boardwalk numbers runner (Burt Lancaster) feels young again with a casino clam shucker (Susan Sarandon) and a lucky cocaine deal.

programme.title: Irena's Vow (2023)
programme.desc: Caught in a German roundup to be used as a slave laborer, Polish nurse Irena Gut becomes a German army major's housekeeper during World War II. Irena risks her life to conceal a dozen Jews within the major's home.
